option.name: originalContent
option.value:
export PATH := C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin;$(PATH)
CC = C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin/gcc.exe SANITIZE = -fsanitize=undefined
CMOCKA_INC = C:/dev/vcpkg/installed/x64-windows/include CMOCKA_LIB = C:/dev/vcpkg/installed/x64-windows/lib
CFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I$(CMOCKA_INC) -Iinclude DEBUG = $(SANITIZE) -g -O0 $(CFLAGS) LDFLAGS = $(SANITIZE) -L$(CMOCKA_LIB) -lcmocka
SRC = $(wildcard src/*.c) TEST_SRC = $(wildcard tests/*.c) BENCH_SRC = $(wildcard bench/*.c) SRC_NO_MAIN = $(filter-out src/main.c, $(SRC))
APP_BIN = build/tasklab.exe TEST_BIN = build/test_runner.exe BENCH_BIN = build/bench_runner.exe
OBJ = $(patsubst src/%.c, build/%.o, $(SRC))
.PHONY: all test bench clean
all: build $(APP_BIN)
test: build $(TEST_BIN) ./$(TEST_BIN)
bench: build $(BENCH_BIN) ./$(BENCH_BIN)
build: mkdir build 2>NUL || exit 0
$(APP_BIN): $(OBJ) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@
$(TEST_BIN): $(SRC_NO_MAIN) $(TEST_SRC) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@ $(LDFLAGS)
$(BENCH_BIN): $(SRC_NO_MAIN) $(BENCH_SRC) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@
build/%.o: src/%.c $(CC) $(DEBUG) -c $< -o $@
clean: rmdir /S /Q build 2>NUL || exit 0

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
export PATH := C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin;$(PATH)
SHELL = C:/msys64/usr/bin/sh.exe
CC = C:/msys64/ucrt64/bin/gcc.exe CMOCKA_INC = C:/dev/vcpkg/installed/x64-windows-static/include CMOCKA_LIB = C:/dev/vcpkg/installed/x64-windows-static/lib
CFLAGS = -Wall -Wextra -I$(CMOCKA_INC) -Iinclude DEBUG = -g -O0 $(CFLAGS) LDFLAGS = -L$(CMOCKA_LIB) -lcmocka
SRC = $(wildcard src/*.c) TEST_SRC = $(wildcard tests/*.c) BENCH_SRC = $(wildcard bench/*.c) SRC_NO_MAIN = $(filter-out src/main.c, $(SRC))
APP_BIN = build/tasklab.exe TEST_BIN = build/test_runner.exe BENCH_BIN = build/bench_runner.exe
OBJ = $(patsubst src/%.c, build/%.o, $(SRC))
.PHONY: all test bench clean
all: build $(APP_BIN)
test: build $(TEST_BIN) ./$(TEST_BIN)
bench: build $(BENCH_BIN) ./$(BENCH_BIN)
build: mkdir build 2>NUL || exit 0
$(APP_BIN): $(OBJ) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@
$(TEST_BIN): $(SRC_NO_MAIN) $(TEST_SRC) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@ $(LDFLAGS)
$(BENCH_BIN): $(SRC_NO_MAIN) $(BENCH_SRC) $(CC) $(DEBUG) $^ -o $@
build/%.o: src/%.c $(CC) $(DEBUG) -c $< -o $@
clean: rmdir /S /Q build 2>NUL || exit 0

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# tasklab — Design Notes
## Sanitizer Policy
- **AddressSanitizer (ASan)**: Not available on MinGW/Windows. Deferred to WSL for stress/sanitizer validation runs. - **UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer (UBSan)**: Enabled in all debug builds via `-fsanitize=undefined`. - Full ASan runs: `wsl make test` (once WSL toolchain is configured).
## Build Profiles
- **Debug** (default): `-fsanitize=undefined -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra` - **Release** (future): `-O2 -DNDEBUG`
## Directory Layout
| Path | Purpose | |---|---| | `include/` | Public headers (tl_task.h, tl_pool.h, etc.) | | `src/` | Implementation files | | `tests/` | cmocka unit + stress tests | | `bench/` | Benchmark harnesses | | `docs/` | Design decisions and benchmark results | | `build/` | Compiled artifacts (git-ignored) |
